description: Kubernetes / Helm Chart Enhancement - Add all 5 deployable apps (quantmail, quantchat, quantai, admin, ws-gateway) with full production configuration to the existing Helm chart at infra/helm/quant-platform/. Add namespace template, Meilisearch StatefulSet, and PostgreSQL/Redis subchart references.
steps: Update infra/helm/quant-platform/values.yaml to add entries for all 5 core apps (quantmail port 3010, quantchat port 3015, quantai port 3020, admin port 3100, ws-gateway port 8080) with replicas, resources, health checks, autoscaling, pdb configs following the existing ws-gateway pattern
Add infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/namespace.yaml - creates a dedicated namespace using Release.Namespace or configurable name
Add Meilisearch StatefulSet template at infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/meilisearch.yaml - StatefulSet with PVC, service, configurable storage class
Add infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/serviceaccount.yaml if not existing - service account with annotations for IRSA (AWS)
Update Chart.yaml to add optional dependencies (bitnami/postgresql, bitnami/redis) as subcharts with condition toggles
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/values-production.yaml override with production-ready replica counts (min 3), resource limits, and strict security settings if not already complete
Update infra/helm/quant-platform/values-staging.yaml with staging-appropriate settings (1-2 replicas, lower resources)
acceptance_criteria: values.yaml contains entries for quantmail, quantchat, quantai, admin, ws-gateway with port/resource/autoscaling/pdb config
namespace.yaml template generates valid K8s Namespace resource
meilisearch.yaml template generates a StatefulSet with PVC
Chart.yaml lists postgresql and redis as optional dependencies
All YAML templates use proper Helm templating syntax ({{ }}) and reference _helpers.tpl
pnpm turbo typecheck passes (no TS breakage from this feature)
findings: All verification passed: 134 typecheck tasks, 108 build tasks, 135 test tasks all green. Pre-commit hook requires NVM_DIR sourced before git commands. Prettier reformatted YAML files during lint-staged.
